category.name: Computer-Use Planning
category.description: Desktop-agent planning and verification discipline for Windows/macOS workflows. This is a text-evaluated proxy until a live GUI harness is added.

tests.name: Windows Desktop Workflow Planning
tests.description: Plan and verify a Windows multi-window task with modal and identity recovery.

tests.name: macOS Cross-App Workflow Planning
tests.description: Plan a macOS Finder/browser/document workflow while preserving user intent.

tests.name: Desktop Verification Discipline
tests.description: Distinguish observed GUI state from assumptions and verify completion before claiming success.
